quotes.text: You can't trust code that you did not totally create yourself.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson
quotes.source: Reflections on Trusting Trust, 1984 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: SOC 2 compliance is proof that you filled out a lot of paperwork, not proof that you're secure.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to learn about security is before you get hacked. The second best time is after. The worst time is never.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best security practice is assuming you've already been breached.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every new dependency is a potential vulnerability. Audit them like you audit your employees.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to think about security is before you ship. The second best time is after you've been breached.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most dangerous thing in the world is a programmer who thinks they understand security.
quotes.author: based
